titles.en: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for the One Who Consumes Usury After Proof
Chapter on the Legal Punishment for the One Who Consumes Usury After Proof

segments: : قُلْتُ لَهُ مَا حَدُّ آكِلِ اَلرِّبَا بَعْدَ اَلْبَيِّنَةِ قَالَ "يُؤَدَّبُ فَإِنْ عَادَ أُدِّبَ فَإِنْ عَادَ قُتِلَ".
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لَهُ مَا حَدُّ آكِلِ اَلرِّبَا بَعْدَ اَلْبَيِّنَةِ قَالَ "يُؤَدَّبُ فَإِنْ عَادَ أُدِّبَ فَإِنْ عَادَ قُتِلَ".

segments:
Hadith.5132 - Ishaq ibn Ammar and Samaah narrated from Abu Basir from Abu Abdullah (as) who said: I asked Imam - "What is the punishment for one who consumes usury after clear evidence (has been established)?"
Imam (as) replied: "He is to be disciplined. If he returns to it, he is disciplined again. If he repeats it a third time, he is to be killed."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5132 - Ishaq ibn Ammar and Samaah narrated from Abu Basir from Abu Abdullah (as) who said: I asked Imam - "What is the punishment for one who consumes usury after clear evidence (has been established)?"
Imam (as) replied: "He is to be disciplined. If he returns to it, he is disciplined again. If he repeats it a third time, he is to be killed."

narratorChain.raw: 5132 - رَوَى إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ وَ سَمَاعَةُ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
